products.name: Vif Crème Solaire Invisible SPF 50+
products.description: Very high protection sunscreen with a dry touch, matte finish. Non-greasy, anti-sand, and water-resistant. Ideal for everyday face protection. Hypoallergenic and fragrance-free.
products.howToUse: Apply generously to face and neck 20 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 2 hours, especially after swimming or drying.

products.name: Vif Dermo-Purifying Cleansing Gel
products.description: Deeply cleanses pores, regulates excess oil secretion, and eliminates acne-causing bacteria without stripping moisture. Enriched with zinc PCA and organic tea tree extracts.
products.howToUse: Apply a dime-sized amount to wet skin, massage gently in circular motions for 1 minute, and rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.

products.name: Vif Retinol Booster Serum 1.5%
products.description: Advanced nighttime renewal serum. Accelerates cellular turnover, visibly reduces fine lines, refines skin texture, and minimizes the appearance of dark spots and hyperpigmentation.
products.howToUse: Apply 3-4 drops to clean, dry face in the evening. Start 2 times per week and gradually increase frequency as your skin tolerates. Always apply sunscreen the following morning.

products.name: Vif Hydrasmose Gel-Cream 72H
products.description: Ultra-light refreshing gel-cream that locks in rich hydration for hours. Infused with cross-linked hyaluronic acid and deep-sea minerals to plump and energize dehydrated skin.
products.howToUse: Apply morning and night onto clean dry skin. Smooth over face and neck until fully absorbed. Perfect as a base under makeup.

products.name: Farmasi VFX Pro Camera Ready Primer
products.description: The ultimate photo-finish oil-free face primer. Creates a smooth, velvet filter effect, blurs enlarged pores and fine lines, and ensures your makeup lasts flawlessly for up to 16 hours.
products.howToUse: Dab a small pea-sized amount onto nose, cheeks, and forehead. Blend outwards using your fingers or a blending sponge before applying foundation.

products.name: Farmasi Double Lash Extend Mascara
products.description: Two-step adjustable mascara that defines both extreme length and dramatic, thick volume in seconds. Features a clever spinning wand cap to filter exact formula loads.
products.howToUse: Use Step 1 (silver cap) to sweep mascara from base to tip for extreme separation and length elongation. Follow with Step 2 (black cap) for deep volumizing coat.

products.name: Farmasi Matte Liquid Lipstick - Retro Rose
products.description: High-pigment, lightweight liquid matte lipstick. Provides absolute smudge-proof and transfer-proof color with a comfortable non-drying finish. Plumps lips with vitamin E hydration.
products.howToUse: Outline lips with the precise precision wand applicator tip, then fill in your lips with a thin single layer. Allow 1 minute to dry to an absolute velvet matte finish.

products.name: Farmasi Garlic & Capixyl Revitalizing Therapy Shampoo
products.description: Best-selling clarifying hair therapy designed for thin, falling, and weak hair. Infused with real garlic extracts (odorless!) and advanced Capixyl peptides to stimulate rapid growth.
products.howToUse: Massage shampoo into thoroughly wet hair and deep scalp. Lather well, let it rest for 2-3 minutes to allow Capixyl peptides to absorb, then rinse cleanly. Use three times weekly.

products.name: Farmasi Dr. C. Tuna Calendula Face Cream
products.description: Soothing lipid-replenishing face cream. Designed specifically for highly sensitive, compromised, eczema-prone, or severely dry skin. Replaces skin oils and repairs moisture barriers.
products.howToUse: Dab onto dry facial patches as needed. Smooth gently. Wonderful for dry winter seasons, soothing sunburns, or post-exfoliation repair.

products.name: Arvea Lait Corps Hydratant Aloe Vera & Argan
products.description: Luxurious moisturizing body lotion harnessing the dual powers of 100% organic Aloe Vera and high-grade Argan Oil. Instantly melts into skin, leaving it deeply nourished, silky, and glowing.
products.howToUse: Apply generously over the entire body after a bath or shower. Give special attention to rough zones like elbows, knees, and heels.

products.name: Arvea Crème Miracle Multi-Usage
products.description: Arvea's legendary calming "Miracle Cream". Infused with honey, propolis, aloe vera gel, and tea tree extracts to heal skin irritation, calm minor scratches, insect bites, or eczema patches.
products.howToUse: Apply a local layer over skin area requiring healing or calming. Softly massage or leave to dry as an overnight protective mask.

products.name: Arvea Gel Apaisant Aloe Vera 95%
products.description: Pure, concentrated cooling gel made of 95% fresh Aloe Vera leaf pulp. Perfect for deep facial hydration, soothing sunburns, calming reactive skin, and restoring natural water balance.
products.howToUse: Apply a generous thick layer on sunburns, sensitive skin patches, or dry skin after shaving. Let it absorb naturally. Store in the fridge for an icy soothing kick!

products.name: Arvea Crème Minceur & Anti-Cellulite
products.description: Highly effective thermogenic body sculpting cream. Combines active plant caffeine, ivy, and rosemary essences to visibly combat stubborn cellulite, flatten skin, and firm contours.
products.howToUse: Apply to target areas (thighs, hips, belly) massage deeply in circular motion until a warm skin glow and mild tingle starts. Best used before exercise or after a hot bath.

users.name: Karima Beauty Admin
users.address: Boutique Karima, Les Berges du Lac 2

messages.text: Bonjour Ali ! Raide de vous accueillir chez **Karima Beauty Boutique**. Je suis Karima Beauty AI, votre conseillère dermo-esthétique experte. Posez-moi vos questions sur nos produits **Vif**, **Farmasi** ou **Arvea**. Je suis à votre entière disposition ! ✨ Can I help you with a recommendation today?

Bonjour and a very warm welcome to **Karima Beauty**, *ma chère*! ✨

It is an absolute pleasure to have you in our exclusive cosmetic gallery today. 

How may I elevate your beauty routine? Whether you are looking to address specific **skin** concerns, enhance your **hair**'s natural vitality, or discover the secrets to a flawless makeup finish, I am here to curate the perfect ritual for you.

Tell me, what are your beauty goals today? We can explore:

• The advanced, scientific dermocosmetics of **Vif** 🧪
• The high-performance, glamorous touch of **Farmasi** 💄
• The pure, organic soothing power of **Arvea Nature** 🌿

*Dites-moi tout*, what does your skin desire today?

Je comprends tout à fait, *ma chère*. There is absolutely no pressure. ✨

Sometimes, taking a gentle pause is the most luxurious routine of all. 

If you ever wish to pamper your skin with the advanced science of **Vif**, explore the glamorous touch of **Farmasi**, or immerse yourself in the organic purity of **Arvea Nature** in the future, please know that your dedicated **Karima Beauty** sanctuary is always open for you.

Should you ever need assistance with an **order** or a personalized recommendation later, I will be right here to assist you. 

*Passez une excellente journée !* Wishing you a truly beautiful and radiant day ahead. 🌸

Bonjour *ma chère* ! ✨

**Karima Beauty** is an exclusive, high-end online **cosmetic gallery** operating from the heart of beautiful **Tunisia** 🇹🇳. 

While we curate our collection as a prestigious digital sanctuary rather than a physical walk-in boutique, we bring the ultimate **dermo-aesthetic** experience directly to your doorstep. 

We offer swift and secure **home delivery** across the entire Tunisian territory. Whether you are in Tunis, Sousse, Sfax, or any other lovely region, your favorite treasures from **Vif**, **Farmasi**, and **Arvea Nature** will arrive elegantly packaged, ready to elevate your beauty ritual. 🌸

Should you wish to place an **order** or if you have any questions about our delivery details, *je suis à votre entière disposition* to assist you!
